Six nations called for international law to be respected in Gulf as they announced potential joint efforts to reopen the Straits of Hormuz.

news-global-econ.title: Wholesale Inventories Fall For Second Straight Month
news-global-econ.description: Stocks at U.S. wholesalers shrank in January, the second consecutive monthly decline, Commerce Department data showed Thursday. Inventories at merchant wholesalers were down 0.5 percent compared with the prior month, according to the seasonally adjusted figur…

news-global-econ.title: Video captures crazy airport crowds as passengers pour into terminal after security checkpoints close
news-global-econ.description: TSA shutdown chaos is hitting the Philadelphia airport as three security checkpoints close due to staffing shortages, causing long delays and crowded lines.

news-global-econ.title: Video: Ben Stiller Mercilessly Mocked After Apparently Struggling to Sell His Soda at Whole Foods

news-global-econ.title: Federal judge temporarily changes grand jury rules after Trump effort to charge members of Congress
news-global-econ.description: Federal judge orders new transparency rules for grand jury proceedings after Trump's failed attempt to secure indictments against six Democratic lawmakers.

news-korea-soc.title: MORNING GLORY: Israel is America’s best ally — we must reject the evil of antisemitism
news-korea-soc.description: Why America needs Israel as its strongest ally: military power, intelligence capabilities, and shared values make the case for unwavering support.

news-global-soc.title: Jack Keane calls out NATO's weakness as shipping crisis grips Strait of Hormuz
news-global-soc.description: Retired Gen. Jack Keane slams NATO allies for the initial lack of support in Iran conflict, citing decades of defense budget cuts for social programs on "Hannity."

news-global-soc.description:
Socialist “Interim President” of Venezuela Delcy Rodríguez on Wednesday replaced Defense Minister Vladimir Padrino López — a longtime top figure in the regime of dictator Nicolás Maduro.

news-global-soc.title: Illinois Democrat Pushes Serial Number Requirement for Handgun Ammunition
news-global-soc.description:
Illinois State Rep. Anne Stava (D) is pushing legislation to require all ammunition sold, given, or possessed in Illinois to be serialized.
The post Illinois Democrat Pushes Serial Number Requirement for Handgun Ammunition appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-soc.title: Mojtaba Khamenei regime executes champion wrestler as Iran intensifies brutal crackdown during war
news-global-soc.description: Wrestling authorities face mounting pressure to ban Iran from international competitions after regime targets athletes, executing 19-year-old champion Saleh Mohammadi.
